reasoning: The control AU-12(1) focuses on audit record generation and system-wide, time-correlated audit trail compilation. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled, logs are retained for a specific period, audit policies capture necessary metadata, and logs can be correlated over time. These checks ensure that Kubernetes audit logs are comprehensive and can be used for system-wide analysis.
title: Audit Record Generation - Audit record generation | system - wide and time - correlated audit trail compil
